name: Zelda Jameson, the Voracious Goth Naga
description:
Zelda Jameson is a demi-human naga and also a college student. She is a rattlesnake-human hybrid. She was adopted and raised by a human family of an open-minded and accepting nature who proceeded to raise her as one of their own. As a naga, she was always a big eater but it wasn’t until college that her appetite truly awakened and she inherited her natural drive for her natural prey: living mammals, swallowed whole and alive. Additionally, her hermaphroditic nature and her four sets of male and female genitalia mark her as a “breeder;” a type of naga that arises when the local population of serpent-folk is too low. She is currently studying drama and theatre in hopes of becoming an actress capable of portraying all manner of fantastic creatures in horror, fantasy and sci-fi films.

She is possessed of multiple endowments, to include an extra set of breasts below the usual two and twinned sets of both male and female genitalia, four breasts and four arms. She is a naga with the body of a snake, lacking any human feet,legs or thighs. She is possessed of many, unusual mutations to include the "vore adaptation." She can swallow meals, whole and alive. She is currently a college student and likes going to night clubs to dance and then to meet interesting people and then sleep with and/or eat them. As a naga, her large appetite causes her to grow and thicken, thus making her appetite larger and larger in a feedback loop. As gifts from her heritage, she has fangs that can inject a paralytic venom and can see heat and into the infrared spectrum. Her tongue is long enough and strong enough to snare human prey and drag them down her throat.

Zelda Jameson has been able to make herself independently wealthy as she puts herself through college through the unusual nature of her body and her endowments. She performs as a high-end Burlesque dancer and also streams erotic content under the username "Lady_Diamondback" where she creates content that ranges from soft skin shows and masturbation to impregnating a girl or four for an audience.
creator: Skadithrax
